# Market Entry Secrets

> AI-powered market entry intelligence platform helping international companies enter the Australian and New Zealand (ANZ) markets. Connects companies with vetted service providers, mentors, events, investor and lead data, and AI-generated market entry reports.

Market Entry Secrets is a B2B SaaS directory and research platform for companies expanding into Australia and New Zealand. It pairs a vetted ecosystem of ANZ service providers, mentors, investors, innovation hubs, and government trade agencies with on-demand, AI-generated market entry reports and a growing library of guides and real-world case studies. All URLs below are public.

## Directories

- [Service Providers](https://marketentrysecrets.com/service-providers): Vetted ANZ market entry service providers (legal, accounting, immigration, marketing, and more).
- [Mentors](https://marketentrysecrets.com/mentors): Expert mentors with hands-on Australian and New Zealand market experience.
- [Events](https://marketentrysecrets.com/events): Australian and New Zealand industry conferences, summits, and networking events.
- [Investors](https://marketentrysecrets.com/investors): Directory of ANZ investors and venture capital firms.
- [Leads](https://marketentrysecrets.com/leads): B2B lead datasets for the Australian market.
- [Innovation Ecosystem](https://marketentrysecrets.com/innovation-ecosystem): Australian innovation hubs, accelerators, and incubators.
- [Government Support](https://marketentrysecrets.com/government-support): Government trade and investment agencies supporting market entry.

## Guides & content

- [Content Hub](https://marketentrysecrets.com/content): Market entry guides and articles.
- [Case Studies](https://marketentrysecrets.com/case-studies): Real-world ANZ market entry case studies.
- [Market Entry Questions](https://marketentrysecrets.com/market-entry-questions): Answers to common questions about entering the Australian market.

### Featured guides

- [Market Entry Services in Australia: The Complete 2026 Guide](https://marketentrysecrets.com/content/market-entry-services-australia-guide)
- [The Irish Tech Founder's Guide to ANZ Expansion](https://marketentrysecrets.com/content/irish-tech-founders-guide-anz-expansion)
- [Understanding Australian Tax Obligations for Foreign Companies](https://marketentrysecrets.com/content/australian-tax-obligations-guide)
- [Go-to-Market for Australian Startups: Finding Your First 100 Customers](https://marketentrysecrets.com/content/au-startup-go-to-market-first-customers)
- [Protecting Your IP from Day One: Trademarks, Patents & Confidentiality](https://marketentrysecrets.com/content/au-startup-ip-trademarks-patents)
- [Hiring Your First Employees: PAYG, Super & Fair Work Essentials](https://marketentrysecrets.com/content/au-first-employees-payg-super-fairwork)

### Featured case studies

- [How GitHub Entered the Australian Market](https://marketentrysecrets.com/case-studies/github-australia-market-entry)
- [How OpenAI Entered the Australian Market](https://marketentrysecrets.com/case-studies/openai-australia-market-entry)
- [How ServiceNow Entered the Australian Market](https://marketentrysecrets.com/case-studies/servicenow-australia-market-entry)
- [How Anthropic Entered the Australian Market](https://marketentrysecrets.com/case-studies/anthropic-australia-market-entry)
- [How Go1 Scaled to a $2 Billion Corporate Learning Unicorn](https://marketentrysecrets.com/case-studies/go1-australia-startup)
- [How Fenergo Won Four of Australia's Biggest Banks](https://marketentrysecrets.com/case-studies/fenergo-anz-market-entry)

## Taxonomy

- [Locations](https://marketentrysecrets.com/locations): Australian cities and regions for market entry.
- [Countries](https://marketentrysecrets.com/countries): Source-country corridors for companies entering ANZ.
- [Sectors](https://marketentrysecrets.com/sectors): Industry-specific market entry insights.

## Product

- [Home](https://marketentrysecrets.com/): Overview of the platform and how it works.
- [Report Creator](https://marketentrysecrets.com/report-creator): Intake wizard that generates a custom AI market entry report.
- [Pricing](https://marketentrysecrets.com/pricing): Plan tiers (Free, Growth, Scale, Enterprise).

## Optional

- [About](https://marketentrysecrets.com/about): Company background and mission.
- [FAQ](https://marketentrysecrets.com/faq): Frequently asked questions.
- [Contact](https://marketentrysecrets.com/contact): Get in touch.
- [Partner with Us](https://marketentrysecrets.com/partner): Apply to list as a service provider or mentor.
- [Privacy Policy](https://marketentrysecrets.com/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Terms of Service](https://marketentrysecrets.com/terms): Terms of service.
